memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Robert Howard (1385-1437)
memoryArtifacts.description: Robert Howard, Knight, (1385—1437), of Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk. He was the eldest son of John Howard (c.1366-1437), of Wiggenhall and East Winch, Norfolk, by the latter's second wife, Alice Tendring …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Howard於1385年出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親Sir John Howard19歲，母親Lady Alice Tendering20歲。他於1420年2月21日之後與Margaret Mowbray在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年4月1日在巴勒斯坦享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Howard于1385年出生在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德时，他的父亲Sir John Howard19岁，母亲Lady Alice Tendering20岁。他于1420年2月21日之后与Margaret Mowbray在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年4月1日在巴勒斯坦享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Howard was born in 1385, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Howard, was 19 and his mother, Lady Alice Tendering, was 20. He married Margaret Mowbray after 21 February 1420, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 1 April 1436, in Palestine, at the age of 51, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Howard est né en 1385, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Howard, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Tendering, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mowbray après 21 février 1420, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1436, à Palestine, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Februar 1420 in England Margaret Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Lui sposato Margaret Mowbray dopo il 21 febbraio 1420, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1436, nel Palestina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Howard(이)가 1385년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Howard(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Tendering(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1420년 2월 21일 이후 영국에서 Margaret Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 4월 1일 팔레스타인에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Howard nasceu em 1385, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Howard, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Tendering, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mowbray após 21 de fevereiro de 1420, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1436, em Palestina, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Howard родился в 1385 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Howard было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Tendering, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mowbray после 21 февраль 1420 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 апреля 1436 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
